title: Beca ADE / Economía BNP Paribas
description:
GRUPO BNP PARIBAS

El Grupo BNP Paribas es el principal banco de la Unión Europea y uno de los más importantes a nivel internacional. Contamos con cerca de 185.000 empleados en 65 países. En España somos más de 5.100 empleados en 13 líneas de negocio.

CIB2S

BNP Paribas en su actividad de Securities Services ofrece una amplia variedad de servicios derivados de la compra-venta de instrumentos financieros y participaciones en fondos de inversión, como su liquidación, custodia, valoración, administración y financiación y todas las operaciones financieras derivadas de los mismos (pago de dividendos, ampliaciones de capital, suscripciones y reembolsos de fondos, etc.).

SOBRE EL PUESTO

MISIÓN

Estamos buscando un/a becario/a junior de back‑office (sin experiencia previa) para incorporarse a nuestro equipo en Madrid. Desde la posición, colaborará directamente con los equipos operativos realizando tareas administrativas vinculadas a los mercados de capitales: gestión y validación de datos de clientes, procesamiento de instrucciones de compra/venta y suscripciones, control de pagos y liquidaciones, y apoyo en la aplicación de normas de riesgo y cumplimiento para evitar exposiciones indebidas y posibles sanciones. Además, asistirá en la comunicación operativa con clientes y contrapartidas, garantizando la correcta documentación.

RESPONSABILIDADES


 * Respetar los plazos y anticipar proactivamente problemas operativos informando al responsable si es necesario
 * Controlar el riesgo para evitar incidencias
 * Intentar, de manera continua, mejorar los procedimientos para agilizar los procesos
 * Ser organizado para trabajar de manera eficaz con el equipo
 * Conocer, entender y seguir las reglas del mercado
 * Cumplir en todo momento las políticas, directrices y procedimientos internos
   
   
   

REQUISITOS


 * Estudios
   
   
   

Estar cursando un grado (preferible ADE o similar), o un máster.


 * Experiencia
   
   
   

No es necesario.


 * Idiomas
   
   
   

Castellano: nativo

Inglés: nivel C1

COMPETENCIAS


 * Técnicas
 * Conocimiento del paquete office
 * Conocimiento de Power BI valorable
 * Transversales & Comportamentales
 * Ser responsable y organizado
 * Proactividad y ganas de aprender
 * Habilidad para colaborar y trabajar en equipo
   
   
   

BENEFICIOS


 * Un día de vacaciones por mes trabajado (conforme duración de Convenio con la universidad).
   
   
   

Compromiso de diversidad e inclusión

BNP Paribas Grupo en España es un empleador que ofrece igualdad de oportunidades y se enorgullece de brindar igualdad de oportunidades de empleo a todos los que buscan trabajo. Nos comprometemos activamente a garantizar que ninguna persona sea discriminada por motivos de edad, discapacidad, cambio de género, estado civil o de matrimonio, embarazo y maternidad/paternidad, raza, religión o creencias, sexo u orientación sexual. La equidad y la diversidad están en el centro de nuestra política de contratación porque creemos que fomentan la creatividad y la eficiencia, lo que a su vez aumenta el rendimiento y la productividad. Por tanto, en igualdad de condiciones en cuanto a cualificación y competencias para el puesto, accederá la persona candidata del sexo menos representado en ese nivel. Nos esforzamos por reflejar la sociedad en la que vivimos, manteniendo la imagen de nuestros clientes.

title: Alumnos/as del Schindler Campus en León
description:
Localización: León, León, España

ID de la solicitud: 86601

Elevamos… Calidad de vida urbana

Nuestros ascensores, escaleras mecánicas y rampas móviles transportan cada día a más de 2.000 millones de personas de forma segura. Como parte del equipo Schindler, contribuirás a mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas y a que los lugares sean más accesibles, inclusivos y sostenibles para todos. Combinamos innovación con seguridad, siempre con los más altos estándares éticos, garantizando que haya unión y respeto entre compañeros y nuestro entorno. Cuando te unes a nosotros, entras a formar parte de nuestra historia y contribuyes a darle forma a nuestro futuro.

Unéte a nosotros como

Alumnos/as del Schindler Campus en León

Tu misión será:

Convertirte en el técnico de mañana aprendiendo de los mejores.

En Schindler buscamos personas con ganas de empezar una nueva etapa profesional. No necesitas experiencia previa en el sector de la elevación: solo motivación, compromiso y ganas de aprender.

¿Qué es Schindler Campus?

Es nuestro programa formativo exclusivo para quienes quieren iniciar una carrera técnica con futuro. Un itinerario de 500 horas que comienza el 7 de abril y combina formación online y presencial, prácticas reales y certificación interna, con posibilidades reales de incorporación a la compañía.

Una formación innovadora, diseñada por expertos de una empresa multinacional líder, y 100% financiada por Schindler.

Buscamos alumnos para muchas más ubicaciones: Santander, Vizcaya, Valladolid, Leon, Zaragoza, Ciudad Real, Madrid, Valencia, Málaga, Sevilla, Granada, Tenerife.

¿Qué necesitas para triunfar?


 * Necesitas motivación por formarte, mejorar cada día y desarrollarte en un oficio con proyección y estabilidad a largo plazo.
 * Te atrae el trabajo técnico, práctico y manual.
 * Te definirías como un/a “manitas”.
 * Has tenido alguna experiencia o formación en entorno industrial.
 * Tienes carné de conducir.
 * Resides en León
 * Quieres desarrollarte en una empresa líder que apuesta por el talento desde el primer día.
   
   
   

¿Qué ofrecemos?


 * La oportunidad de mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas. Ayuda a dar forma a una compañía que ofrece productos y servicios de calidad y en la que confían cada día dos mil millones de personas en todo el mundo.
 * Impulsa tu desarrollo. Te ayudamos a crecer ofreciéndote el apoyo que necesitas para mejorar tus capacidades y acceder a oportunidades que te permitan impulsar tu carrera profesional.
 * Desarróllate en un ambiente diverso e inclusivo. A través de iniciativas locales y mundiales, promovemos una cultura de inclusión que celebra la diversidad y garantiza oportunidades de crecimiento igualitarias.
   
   
   

Cómo es el programa


 * Formación online + talleres presenciales Clases en directo y grabadas, y prácticas en centros de formación en toda España.
 * Escuela Técnica Schindler (Zaragoza) Visita formativa a nuestras instalaciones para conocer el producto y a tus futuros compañeros.
 * Certificación interna “Montaje en Schindler” Obtendrás la acreditación que te habilita como profesional de montaje en la compañía.
 * Prácticas reales remuneradas Aplicarás lo aprendido junto a nuestros equipos en delegaciones de toda España. Prácticas remuneradas: 800 € al mes.
   
   
   

Cómo acceder a Schindler Campus

En esta edición contaremos con una consultora que nos apoyará en la selección de los alumnos. Abajo te detallamos las etapas del proceso:


 * Inscripción y envío de CV (2 min)
 * Prueba de razonamiento espacial y mecánico (20 min)
 * Evaluación de competencias (20 min)
 * Video presentación (5 min)
 * Entrevista presencial (45 min)
   
   
   

En Schindler apostamos por el mejor talento. Financiamos tu formación y te ofrecemos un verdadero plan de carrera.

Ahora es tu momento. Demuestra lo que vales y da el primer paso hacia tu futuro profesional.

ACCEDE A ESTE ENLACE y comienza tu proceso de selección para acceder al Schindler Campus:


 * https://rcf.adecco.com/process/ZUPcGM3tDbbxzu4YEZbu/4bc3bc6f-8968-49ec-9457-3d18ec114db1
   
   
   

Elevamos… Tu carrera

Forma parte de nuestro equipo y ayúdanos a mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas y a impulsar la innovación, siempre con seguridad y sostenibilidad. Valoramos tus capacidades y perspectivas personales, ya que juntos daremos forma a las ciudades sostenibles de hoy y de mañana.

¿Estás listo/a para embarcarte en un nuevo viaje? ¡Únete al #EquipoSchindler! Descubre más en nuestro sitio web de carrera.



En el Grupo Schindler valoramos la inclusión y la diversidad, y practicamos la equidad para crear igualdad de oportunidades para todas las personas. Nos esforzamos por que todos los candidatos cualificados sean tomados en consideración para el empleo sin importar la edad, la raza, el origen étnico, el color, la afiliación religiosa, la afiliación sindical, el género, la identidad de género, la orientación sexual, el estado civil, el origen nacional, la nacionalidad, la genética y la salud o la discapacidad.

Cualquier solicitud no solicitada de agencias de reclutamiento se considera rechazada y no constituye de ninguna manera una oferta por parte de una agencia de reclutamiento.

title: Leveraged Finance Off‑Cycle Trainee
description:
Ready to shape landmark leveraged finance deals across Europe?

Want to make a real impact on top‑tier private‑equity transactions?

Looking for a dynamic, inclusive culture with strong development opportunities?

INDEX

1️⃣ Who we are

2️⃣ Mission

3️⃣ What you’ll do

4️⃣ What you’ll bring

5️⃣ Our perks

6️⃣ About BNP Paribas

Who We Are

We are BNP Paribas Corporate & Institutional Banking, delivering advisory, financing, transaction banking, capital‑markets and asset‑services solutions to large corporates, multinationals and financial institutions. Our team in Spain counts 620 professionals across Madrid, Barcelona, Bilbao and A Coruña, connected to a network in 56 countries.

MISSION

As a Leveraged Finance Off‑Cycle Trainee, you will support the origination and execution of high‑yield bond and term‑loan transactions, work on pitch processes, and conduct credit and financial analysis. You will collaborate with internal teams and external clients, gaining hands‑on experience in landmark leveraged finance deals and building a foundation for a future analyst role.

What You’ll Do


 * Work on pitch processes alongside M&A, ECM, Syndicate and Coverage teams.
 * Interact with debt issuers, private‑equity sponsors and internal stakeholders.
 * Build cash‑flow projection models and conduct detailed financial‑statement analysis.
 * Prepare credit memos, capital‑markets presentations and due‑diligence reports.
 * Ensure timely completion of regulatory and compliance training.
   
   
   

What You’ll Bring


 * A degree from a top university with an excellent academic record.
 * Prior experience in investment banking, debt products, M&A, ECM, consulting, private‑debt/equity or similar.
 * Fluency in English; Spanish preferred; additional EU language a plus.
 * Strong analytical and credit‑risk analysis capabilities.
 * Excellent communication, teamwork and a proactive learning attitude.
 * Ability to manage multiple transactions under pressure.
   
   
   

OUR PERKS


 * Training programs, career plans and internal mobility across national and international offices.
 * Diversity and Inclusion Committee that ensures an inclusive work environment (see Diversity, equality and inclusion BNP Paribas).
 * Corporate volunteering program (1 Million Hours 2 Help) for community impact.
 * Flexible compensation plan and hybrid remote model (50% on‑site, 50% remote).
 * 32 vacation days per year.
 * Competitive benefits package supporting health, well‑being and professional growth.
   
   
   

About Bnp Paribas

We are BNP Paribas, a leading European bank with a strong international footprint – present in 64 countries and employing over 178 000 professionals. Our Corporate & Institutional Banking division, together with International Financial Services, provides financing, investment, savings and insurance solutions to corporations, SMEs and institutions worldwide. Leveraged Finance is a core pillar of our CIB franchise, enabling us to support ambitious growth projects across Europe and beyond. Our presence in Spain, with teams in Madrid, Barcelona, Bilbao and A Coruña, reinforces our commitment to the Iberian market.

APPLY NOW!

Apply now to become part of our Leveraged Finance off‑cycle program and launch your career in investment banking.

title: Sales Development Representative (Internship) - English speaker
description:
About Us

S2M-group is a global sales development agency on a mission to support industry-leading IT & Software companies with complex sales cycles to grow their business and boost revenue at scale. Our integrated demand generation services help our clients position their solutions and connect with top prospects worldwide.




At S2M-group, you’ll be part of a diverse and dynamic team (15+ nationalities!) spread across Spain, France, Thailand, China, and Canada. We thrive on collaboration, innovation, and a passion for global B2B Software Sales.




Are You Up for the Challenge?

As a Sales Development Representative, you'll be a key player in helping global tech leaders expand their sales pipelines. Using our proven **value-based selling methodology**, you’ll identify and nurture potential leads, ensuring our clients connect with the right decision-makers.




Your Key Responsibilities




📞 Cold calling - Execute high-volume outbound calls to targeted prospects, deliver compelling value propositions, handle objections in real time, and secure qualified meetings for the sales team.

🌟 Lead Qualification – Assess the potential fit of leads based on budget, timeline, and decision-making authority.

💪 Sales Pipeline Management – Track and manage the sales funnel, ensuring leads progress efficiently through the sales process.

📈 Sales Support – Assist in scheduling meetings, preparing sales materials, and following up on leads.

📝 Data Management – Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in our CRM system.

📊 Reporting & Analysis – Generate reports to identify trends and opportunities for our clients.

🧠 Continuous Learning – Stay updated on industry trends, best practices, and new technologies.




What You Need to Succeed




🌍 Languages: Native-level or full proficiency in English (any other European language like Spanish, French, Arabic, Dutch, German, Italian is a big plus)

🎓 Education: Currently completing a Bachelor/Master/MBA degree in Business administration, International relationships, International businesses, Marketing or similar.

📝 Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written business communication.

💪 Work Ethic: Independent, motivated, and able to multitask in a fast-paced environment.

🔬 Tech-Savvy: Openness to learning sales automation tools (e.g. Outreach, LinkedIn Sales Navigator).

🎯 Team Player: Ability to collaborate in a high-energy sales environment.

🤓 Curious & Proactive: Strong interest in the IT/Software Industry with a ‘can-do’ attitude.

🧬 Logical Thinking: Ability to structure responses and think critically.




Why Join S2M-group?




🕣 Flexible working hours (8:30-09:30 to 17:30-18:30)

☀️ Intensive Fridays during the summer-time (we leave at 15:30)

✨ Global & Multicultural Environment – Work with a team from 15+ nationalities.

📚 Comprehensive Training – Hands-on onboarding to help you excel in your role.

👥 Supportive Team Culture– A horizontal hierarchy where your ideas matter.

🌟 Professional Growth – Learning & development sessions every month.

📈 Career Progression – Regular performance reviews, personal development plans and possibility to become a permanent member of our team.

🎮 Fun & Engaging Team Activities – Team-building events, social outings & more!

💎 Attractive Benefits Package – Fixed incentive, bonus on the 3rd and 6th month of internship, lunch compensation & more!!




Join Us!

At S2M-group, we foster an inclusive and dynamic work environment where passion, innovation, and ambition drive success. If you’re ready to make an impact in the world of B2B sales, we’d love to hear from you!




S2M-group is an equal opportunity employer (EOE) that is committed to diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We make hiring decisions based solely on qualifications, motivation, and business needs.

title: Internship Spain Operations - March/April 2026
description:
Please consider the following before applying:


 * The internship will start in March/April 2026.
 * You need to be enrolled in a degree/master throughout the whole duration of the internship (6 months).
 * We strongly advise you to include the degree's expected graduation date (month/year) in the CV.
   
   

At Nestlé, we want to help shape a better and healthier world, inspire people to live healthier lives and deliver impact at a scale and pace that makes a difference. We do this by fostering a diverse, friendly, supportive, and collaborative environment, that creates positive disruption, embraces innovation, and empowers people and teams to win.

We aim to hire friendly, respectful, inspiring people who care about the people’s lives that we touch every single day.

Be a force for good. Join Nestlé and visit us on www.nestle.com.

Description Of Internship

At Nestlé, our Operations and Supply Chain teams are the backbone of our ability to deliver quality products to consumers around the world. From sourcing raw materials to ensuring on-time delivery, this function orchestrates the entire value chain with precision, agility, and a commitment to excellence.

Whether it’s optimizing production flows, ensuring packaging compliance, managing supplier relationships, or driving quality assurance in our factories and labs, our teams work cross-functionally to uphold the highest standards of safety, efficiency, and sustainability. You’ll gain exposure to areas such as demand and supply planning, packaging operations, quality control, and logistics coordination.

Make our Operations & Supply Chain team your next career destination and you’ll contribute to real business impact—analyzing data, improving processes, and supporting innovation across our product portfolio. You’ll be part of a collaborative environment where your ideas and attention to detail will help shape the future of how we make and move our products.

You should apply if you are:


 * Having the necessary credits to be able to carry out the curricular or extracurricular 6 months internship in our company. We only accept the candidacies of alumni who are enrolled in degrees or masters linked to official universities.
 * Fluent in English, both spoken and written. Spanish and/or Catalan is a plus. 
 * Flexible and autonomous, you can meet strict deadlines while also being open to giving and receiving regular feedback.
 * You are precise and do your utmost to comply to procedures and deadlines.
 * You are a good communicator.
 * Excellent digital skills (PowerPoint, Word, Excel as a minimum).
   
   

 

What can you expect from this experience? 


 * We have a friendly, supportive team with a coaching and mentoring environment.
 * There are real opportunities for future development and progression – this really could be a move towards the exciting professional career you’ve always wanted. 
 * Through your term, you will receive developmental feedback to ensure that you are learning and understanding the importance of your contribution within the world’s largest food company.
 * You will also build your business acumen and leadership capabilities, gaining insights on how an FMCG company works thanks to direct access to a variety of stakeholders in different businesses, functions and markets. 
   
   

 

Terms & Conditions: 


 * College scholarship: 883€ per month.
 * 6 months, 30 hours per week.
 * Office based, morning schedule (9h to 16h, with 1 hour break).
   
   

Nestlé is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion. If you are selected to participate in the recruitment process, please inform Human Resources of any accommodation you may require. Nestlé will work with you to ensure that you are able to fully participate in the process.

title: Trainee Digital Designer
description:
We are WPP Production - the unified global production company that brings together all of WPP's content producers, studios and craft experts into one connected organisation. We combine world-class human craft with next generation technology to originate, design, and deliver multi-channel content systems at scale. Built for borderless collaboration and powered by deep craft expertise, we are the production engine designed for today's always on, AI driven marketing world.

WPP Production is part of WPP. WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients, and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com

Responsibilities


 * Create digital pieces for social media and ads.
 * Support in the creation of visual concepts.
 * Develop rapid prototypes of designs.
 * Prepare files for production and localisation.
 * Design using Photoshop, Illustrator and InDesign.
 * Research design trends and contribute ideas.
 * Assist in the preparation of creative presentations.
 * Work with other teams to execute projects.
 * Adapt designs for different markets and platforms.
   
   

Requirements


 * Degree in Advertising, Design or similar.
 * Interest in art direction and creation of digital pieces.
 * Knowledge of the design process, including creativity, production and localisation.
 * Proficiency in the Adobe Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator and Indesign).
 * Ability to rapidly prototype visual designs.
 * Contribute to the workflow of the Shopper team.
   
   

Conditions


 * Dynamic and creative work environment
 * International company with great growth potential
 * On-site practices with possibility of telecommuting
 * Access to training
 * 25 hours per week (5 hours daily between 9:00 and 18:00)
 * Study grant €300/month
   
   

Why work here:

At WPP Production, you’ll help shape the future of content production at a truly global scale. We bring together world-class talent, cutting-edge studios, and advanced technology to solve some of the most complex creative and production challenges in the industry. You’ll work in a collaborative, borderless environment where craft excellence is valued, innovation is encouraged, and AI and next-generation tools are used to amplify not replace human creativity. With access to diverse projects, global career opportunities, and the backing of WPP’s unmatched network, this is a place where you can grow your skills, make real impact, and create work that performs for every audience, across every channel, at every moment.

Inclusion and Impact

WPP is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.

Data

We rely on legitimate interest as a legal basis for processing personal information under the GDPR for purposes of recruitment and applications for employment. When you click the "Submit Application" button at the bottom of this page, this will send all the information you have added to WPP Production. Before you do this, we think it's a good idea to read through our Privacy statement. This explains what we do with your personal data when you apply for a role with us, and, how you can update the information you have provided us with or how to remove it.

Please contact careers@wppproduction.com if you need the job advert or form in another format.

title: Digital Marketing Intern
description:
Overview




Keysight is at the forefront of technology innovation, delivering breakthroughs and trusted insights in electronic design, simulation, prototyping, test, manufacturing, and optimization. Our ~15,000 employees create world-class solutions in communications, 5G, automotive, energy, quantum, aerospace, defense, and semiconductor markets for customers in over 100 countries. Learn more about what we do.

Our award-winning culture embraces a bold vision of where technology can take us and a passion for tackling challenging problems with industry-first solutions. We believe that when people feel a sense of belonging, they can be more creative, innovative, and thrive at all points in their careers.



We are offering a paid internship for students who are willing to spend their university placement year in our digital marketing department.



- Internship starting date: June 2025

- Internship end date: June 2026



Are you passionate about web, data analytics, and storytelling through data? Are you looking to gain hands-on experience during your university placement year? Join our dynamic Global Marketing team at Keysight and take the first step toward building a rewarding career in digital marketing.



As an intern, you’ll contribute to impactful projects across our organization, supporting the data analysis and continuous improvement of our website, including the execution of digital marketing tactics, the creation of web pages and promotional content.



You’ll be part of a global, multicultural team that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning



All in a vibrant and inspiring location.




Responsibilities




 * Analyze, organize, and report on marketing data
 * Support the execution of digital marketing tactics, including the creation of web pages, emails, and promotional content.
 * Learn and apply industry-standard tools, techniques, and platforms.

Behavioral competencies

 * Results-driven, proactive and able to work autonomously.
 * Passion for data and technology.
 * Passion for web
 * Problem-solving attitude.
 * Organizational and communication skills.

title: Investment Analyst Intern
description:
¿Quiénes somos? 

 

Whitehole es un Family Office dedicado a la inversión que gestiona activamente a) una cartera de activos de renta variable, alternativos y coberturas y b) una cartera de compañías locales en las que contamos con participaciones significativas.  

 

Nuestra misión es la búsqueda oportunidades de inversión que generen valor de forma consistente y a largo plazo. Invertimos en compañías de calidad, gestionadas por equipos directivos excelentes, alineadas con sus stakeholders y con ventajas competitivas duraderas en el tiempo. 

 

Tus responsabilidades: 

 

Buscamos a un analista que se involucre en todos los aspectos de nuestro proceso de inversión y que dé soporte a los equipos gestores, principalmente, con las siguientes tareas: 

 

 * Análisis de mercados, temáticas y sectores de interés para identificar oportunidades de inversión 
 * Monitoring de los resultados de las compañías en cartera y de nuestro pipeline de inversión 
 * Elaboración de documentación soporte para la toma de decisiones en nuestras compañías en cartera 
 * Benchmarking de competidores 
 * Preparación de documentación para stakeholders 

 

Requisitos: 

 

 * Buscamos candidatos con ganas de aprender, un especial interés por análisis de negocios y la inversión y un buen encaje cultural con el equipo 
 * Conocimientos financieros, capacidad analítica y nivel alto de inglés tanto hablado como escrito 
 * Disponibilidad para trabajar a jornada parcial en el periodo de junio a diciembre exceptuando agosto 

 

¿Qué ofrece Whitehole? 

 

 * Formar parte de un equipo joven, motivado y ágil que disfruta trabajando en equipo 
 * Interacción con los distintos agentes del ecosistema de inversión: bancos, consultores, asesores, abogados, brokers… 
 * Bolsa retributiva

title: Concessions Merchandising and Planning Intern - AWWG Brands International (Madrid)
description:
Who We Are...

At AWWG, transformation is embedded in our DNA. Founded in 1998 under the name of Pepe Jeans Group. With headquarters in Madrid, Spain, and design offices in London and Nice, this global fashion group integrates the iconic brands Pepe Jeans London, Hackett, and Façonnable. AWWG also has the master franchisee and agency for Tommy Hilfiger (Spain and Portugal) as well as the agency for Calvin Klein, DKNY, Donna Karan, and Karl Lagerfeld (Spain and Portugal).

The project!

As a Concessions Merchandising and Planning Intern, you will support the Concessions Merchandising team in all tasks related to stock management, positioning and objectives in our points of sales.

What will the role entail?


 * Stock management and optimization: Support annual stocktakes, manage weekly receiving, oversee stock transfers and system adjustments, monitor replenishment and product release status, and maximize stock efficiency and profit flow.
 * Product reporting and performance analysis: Prepare and analyze weekly and monthly reports (best sellers, sell-through, top 10, slow movers, out-of-stock, clearance), monitor sales performance and KPIs, and provide data-driven insights to support buying decisions.
 * Product documentation and order management: Create and maintain product wikis and product books, process initial orders, and support product purchasing and assortment planning.
 * Promotions and markdown management: Analyze promotional performance, prepare communications and product listings, and ensure accurate execution across channels.
 * Coordination with retail locations: Maintain ongoing communication with stores to manage requests, follow up on operational needs, and coordinate processes such as returns, price changes, launches, and promotions.
 * Selfridges (Online & Retail) operations: Oversee reporting, replenishment, and product release; manage SAP store setup, sales integration, stock monitoring, PRICAT internal coding, shipment bookings prior to dispatch, and support online store management (assortment, product descriptions, imagery).
   
   
   

What do we offer?


 * Great international working environment.
 * Corporate Offices in Madrid with canteen .
 * Home office depending on the position.
 * Flexible working hours.
 * Flexible benefits.
 * Discount on the brands of the Group.
   
   
   

Requirements:

Requirements


 * University degree or higher in Business Administration, Analytics
 * Languages: high Level of Spanish and English (min. C1) any other languages are a big plus.
 * IT Skills: Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel or similar data analysis tools (VLOOKUP, pivot tables, formulas)
 * Excellent communication skills and attention to detail.
 * Strong time-management, problem-solving and analytical skills.
 * Ability to work independently and in a team.

title: Sustainability Intern
description:
Join Ferrovial: Where Innovation Meets Opportunity

Are you ready to elevate your career with a global leader in infrastructure solving complex problems and generating a positive outcome on people’s lives? At Ferrovial, we are not just a company; we are a community of innovators and trailblazers. Listed on three major stock markets: Nasdaq (US), Euronext Amsterdam (Netherlands) and IBEX 35 (Spain), we are also member of the Dow Jones Sustainability Index and FTSE4Good. We operate in more than 15 countries and have a workforce of over 24,000 professionals worldwide. Ferrovial’s activity is carried out through our business units, including Highways, Airports, Construction, and Energy.

Our Corporate organization oversees business activities, providing strategic planning, communication, legal, finance and human resources services to the business units. As a member of our corporate organization, you will have a broad view of our company, further supporting your career development.

Why Ferrovial?


 * Global presence, local impact: Be part of a company that is shaping the future of infrastructure worldwide, with challenging roles and projects that make a real difference.
 * Collaborative excellence: Work alongside talented professionals in a collaborative environment where your ideas and contributions are valued.
 * Inclusive Culture: Thrive in an innovative and respectful workplace that values every voice, celebrates what makes us unique and turns differences into innovation.
 * Career growth: Benefit from global and cross-business unit mobility, with development processes designed to ensure your professional growth.
 * Compelling benefits and employee wellbeing: Enjoy a comprehensive benefits package that rewards your hard work and dedication and take advantage of initiatives designed to support your physical and psychological health.
 * Productivity tools: Utilize cutting-edge tools like Microsoft Copilot to enhance your productivity and efficiency.
   
   

Job Description:

About The Role

The selected candidate will join Ferrovial’s Sustainability team, supporting the development and implementation of the company’s environmental strategy at a global level. This role contributes to advancing Ferrovial’s commitment to climate action, natural capital preservation, circular economy, and water resource management. The intern will collaborate in analyzing environmental performance, preparing sustainability reports, and supporting key initiatives aimed at reducing the company’s environmental footprint and enhancing its sustainability ratings.

Key Responsibilities


 * Development and implementation of environmental projects related to climate change, natural capital, circular economy, and water.
 * Calculation of Carbon Footprint, Water Footprint, and biodiversity impact.
 * Preparation of Non-Financial Information Statements (EINF) and sustainability reports.
   
   

Qualifications


 * Environmental background: Environmental Sciences, Biology, or Engineering (Forestry, Agricultural, Industrial, etc.).
 * High level of English (C1).
 * Knowledge in climate change (carbon footprint, climate risks, biodiversity, environmental impacts).
 * Advanced level in Office tools.
 * Ability to work in a team, influencing skills, results orientation, adaptability, and proactivity.
 * Support with environmental and sustainability ratings (Dow Jones Sustainability Index – Best in Class, CDP, etc.).
 * Analysis of environmental and sustainability legislation.
   
   

Seize the challenge. Move the world together! Innovative, creative, respectful, and diverse are some of the ways we describe ourselves. We are motivated by challenges, and we collaborate across our business units to move the world together. Your journey to a fulfilling career starts here!

Ferrovial is an equal opportunity employer.  We treat all jobs applications equally, regardless of gender, color, race, ethnicity, religion, national origin, age, disability, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and expression, covered veteran status or protected genetic information (each, a “Protected Class”), or any other protected class in accordance with applicable laws.

#WeAreFerrovial

title: Corporate Investment Intern
description:
Location

Sevilla, Spain

Mission

We are looking for a Corporate Investments Intern to support the corporate investment and strategy functions in the review, monitoring, and governance of the company’s investment portfolio. The intern will contribute to ensuring the consistent application of investment criteria, performance tracking, and decision-making frameworks across projects and geographies. This role provides exposure to portfolio oversight, corporate governance, and market intelligence activities within a leading renewable energy platform.

Responsibilities


 * Support the review and monitoring of the company’s investment portfolio, ensuring consistency with internal investment guidelines and approval frameworks.
 * Assist in tracking key investment metrics, project status, and performance indicators across regions and technologies.
 * Help maintain and improve internal investment reporting tools, dashboards, and control processes.
 * Support the preparation of materials for internal committees and senior management, including portfolio overviews and decision-support analyses.
 * Contribute to the definition, documentation, and update of internal guidelines, processes, and best practices related to investments and capital allocation.
 * Perform market intelligence and competitive analysis on renewable energy trends, investment activity, and peer benchmarking.
 * Support ad-hoc strategic and analytical initiatives related to corporate planning and investment decision-making.
 * Coordinate with internal stakeholders (finance, development, commercial, technical) to gather and validate relevant information.
   
   

Job Requirements


 * Bachelor’s or Master’s student, or recent graduate, in Finance, Economics or Business Administration.
 * Strong interest in corporate finance, strategy, and renewable energy.
 * Structured and analytical mindset with strong attention to detail.
 * Good organizational skills and ability to manage multiple information streams.
 * Intermediate proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint.
 * Fluency in English.
   
   

Preferred (Nice To Have)


 * Basic understanding of investment governance, portfolio management, or corporate finance.
 * Introductory knowledge of renewable energy markets and industry dynamics.
 * First exposure to market intelligence, strategic analysis, or performance reporting.
 * Curiosity and willingness to understand how investment decisions are made at a corporate level.
   
   

What We Offer


 * Paid internship.
 * Exposure to corporate-level investment oversight and governance in a renewable energy platform.
 * Hands-on experience in market intelligence and strategic decision support.
 * Learning-by-doing in a fast-growing, international organization.
 * Close interaction with senior professionals across multiple functions.
 * A collaborative and international work environment.

Recherche

Thérapeute en psychomotricité HES

Catégories

Domaines professionnels Médecine, santé - Social, sciences humaines - Sport, mouvement Niveaux de formation Formation HES, HEP, EPF ou universitaire Swissdoc 0.731.74.0

Mise à jour 12.09.2023


 * Description
 * Formation
 * Perspectives professionnelles
 * Adresses utiles
 * Autres informations
   
   

Description

Le ou la thérapeute en psychomotricité interviennent auprès de personnes présentant des troubles psychomoteurs: maladresse, manque d'équilibre ou de coordination, insuffisance du tonus musculaire, difficultés d'orientation, de communication, de comportement ou d'apprentissage. Ces professionnels cherchent à prévenir, atténuer voire guérir ces troubles grâce au jeu, à la relaxation, à l'expression corporelle ou à l'improvisation musicale.

Leurs Principales Activités Consistent À:

Évaluation


 * observer et évaluer les conduites motrices de base (marche, saut, équilibre, coordination gestuelle, etc.), les compétences sur les plans de la communication et des apprentissages auprès de bébés, d'enfants, d'adolescents, d'adultes ou de personnes âgées;
 * établir des diagnostics psychomoteurs;
 * évaluer les mesures thérapeutiques à mettre en place;
   
   

Traitement


 * proposer diverses modalités d'intervention: relaxation, expression corporelle (jeux de ballons et de cerceaux, jeux symboliques, danse...) ou plastique (dessin, peinture) pour soutenir la personne dans le développement de ses facultés corporelles et psychiques et favoriser ainsi son insertion sociale;
 * harmoniser les relations que la personne entretient avec elle-même et son environnement, en mobilisant les fonctions motrices, affectives et mentales;
 * planifier et conduire des séances de thérapie ainsi que collaborer avec l'entourage;
   
   

Prévention et sensibilisation


 * intervenir dans les crèches ou les jardins d'enfants afin de sensibiliser le personnel au développement harmonieux des enfants;
 * développer des actions de promotion de la santé dans le domaine de la psychomotricité auprès des professionnels s'occupant de personnes de tous âges ou à l'attention du public;
 * mener des travaux de réflexion, de recherche et de développement quant à leurs pratiques professionnelles.
   
   

Environnement de travail

Les thérapeutes en psychomotricité travaillent de façon autonome, mais en étroite collaboration avec des médecins, des psychologues, des logopédistes, des enseignants, des éducateurs, ainsi qu'avec les parents. Ils voient les personnes individuellement ou en petits groupes, selon les difficultés et les besoins des personnes qui leur sont adressées. Ils contribuent à la recherche et au développement de leurs pratiques lors d'échanges interprofessionnels. Spécialistes de leur domaine, ils sont amenés à faire connaître la psychomotricité dans le cadre de différentes institutions et auprès de publics divers.

Formation

La formation de thérapeute en psychomotricité s'acquiert dans une haute école spécialisée.

Lieux


 * Genève: master;
 * Zurich: bachelor et master.
   
   

Pour plus de détails, consulter www.orientation.ch/hautesecoles.

Durée


 * Bachelor: 3 ans;
 * Master: 2 ans.
   
   

Conditions d'admission

Bachelor (Zurich uniquement)

Accès Direct:


 * maturité gymnasiale ou maturité spécialisée en pédagogie, travail social ou santé;
 * ou bachelor HES ou universitaire;
 * ou diplôme d'enseignant primaire ou secondaire I.
   
   

Accès Avec Examen Complémentaire Ou Passerelle:


 * autre maturité spécialisée ou maturité professionnelle;
 * ou certificat fédéral de capacité (CFC) ou diplôme ES, plusieurs années de pratique professionnelle et 30 ans révolus;
 * ou autre diplôme: admission sur dossier.
   
   

De Plus, Pour Tous Les Candidats:


 * examen d'admission.
   
   

Master

Genève:


 * bachelor HES en travail social, soins infirmiers, physiothérapie, ergothérapie, sage-femme, nutrition et diététique ou musique et mouvement;
 * ou bachelor universitaire en psychologie, pédagogie curative, pédagogie spécialisée, sciences de l'éducation (avec orientation vers l'éducation spéciale), psychologie et éducation, logopédie, sciences du mouvement et du sport (avec mineure psychologie) ou médecine;
 * ou bachelor HEP ou certificat complémentaire en enseignement préscolaire et primaire;
 * ou autre diplôme: admission sur dossier.
   
   

De Plus, Pour Tous Les Candidats:


 * appréciation des prédispositions professionnelles (rapport personnel, entretien individuel, mise en situation).
   
   

Zurich:


 * bachelor HES en thérapie psychomotrice.
   
   

Titre obtenu


 * bachelor et/ou master.
   
   

Contenu (à titre indicatif)


 * approches théoriques et méthodologiques;
 * formation pratique et approche clinique;
 * recherche appliquée et clinique.
   
   

Pour plus de détails, consulter www.orientation.ch/etudes.

Perspectives professionnelles

Les thérapeutes en psychomotricité peuvent travailler dans des endroits très différents. Ils peuvent d'une part intégrer des organismes officiels tels que services médico-pédagogiques, psychopédagogiques, scolaires ou services de santé pour la jeunesse, ainsi que dans les hôpitaux psychiatriques. D'autre part, ils peuvent exercer leur activité dans des institutions privées ou semi-privées comme les instituts pour enfants handicapés physiques, mentaux ou souffrant de troubles du comportement, les crèches ou les jardins d'enfants. Ces professionnels ont aussi la possibilité de s'établir en privé.

Perfectionnement

Les thérapeutes en psychomotricité peuvent envisager les perfectionnements suivants:


 * formations continues courtes assurées par le Centre d'études et de formation continue de la HETS (CEFOC), sur divers domaines: approche psycho-cognitive en psychomotricité, discipline positive, médiation psycho-sociale, etc.;
 * cours organisés par les différents services médico-pédagogiques ou psychopédagogiques ou les milieux hospitaliers;
 * Master of Arts HEP en pédagogie spécialisée (orientations enseignement spécialisé ou éducation précoce spécialisée) ou en Special Needs Education;
 * Master of Arts en pédagogie spécialisée ou en sciences de l'éducation (orientation enseignement spécialisé);
 * Certificate of Advanced Studies (CAS) de spécialiste en analyse des pratiques professionnelles dans le domaine de l'action sociale, éducative, psychosociale et de la santé ou de praticien-ne formateur-trice;
 * Diploma of Advanced Studies (DAS) de superviseur-e dans le domaine de l'action sociale, éducative, psychosociale et de la santé;
 * etc.
   
   

Pour plus de détails, consulter www.orientation.ch/perfectionnement et www.orientation.ch/postgrades.

title: Prácticas Ingeniería Química
description:
TESICNOR, S.L.


Empresa de ingeniería especializada en Seguridad Industrial, Análisis de Riesgos y Cumplimiento Normativo en instalaciones industriales a nivel nacional.


📍 Centro administrativo: Noain Navarra


💻 Modalidad: 100% Remoto (desde cualquier ciudad de España)


Perfil Académico (Prioritario)


   
   
 * Grado en Ingeniería Química
   
   
 * Doble titulación en Química + Ingeniería Química
   
   
 * Máster en Ingeniería Química
   
   


Buscamos estudiantes de último curso con interés en el ámbito de la consultoría técnica industrial, normativa y análisis de riesgos.


Tareas


El/la estudiante participará en proyectos reales de consultoría técnica industrial, colaborando en:


   
   
 * Elaboración de Planes de Autoprotección
   
   
 * Redacción de documentación técnica para cumplimiento SEVESO
   
   
 * Desarrollo de proyectos APQ
   
   
 * Participación en estudios HAZID, HAZOP y SIL
   
   
 * Introducción a modelización de escenarios de riesgo (Effect, RiskCurve, DNV)
   
   
 * Análisis normativo y revisión técnica de instalaciones industriales
   
   
 * Apoyo en coordinación técnica y gestión documental de proyectos
   
   


Requisitos


✅ Perfil buscado


   
   
 * Estudiante de último curso en Ingeniería Química
   
   
 * Interés por la normativa industrial y el entorno regulatorio
   
   
 * Capacidad analítica y orientación al detalle
   
   
 * Interés por el trabajo técnico-documental y de consultoría
   
   
 * Inglés nivel negociación (lectura de normativa y documentación técnica)
   
   


🧩 Características de las prácticas


   
   
 * Prácticas extracurriculares
   
   
 * Convenio obligatorio con Universidad o Centro Formativo (requisito excluyente)
   
   
 * Duración aproximada: 6 meses
   
   
 * Jornada: 30–35 horas semanales
   
   
 * Modalidad: 100% remoto
   
   
 * Inicio: Idealmente marzo 2026
   
   


🎯 Área de especialización


   
   
 * Seguridad Industrial
   
   
 * Normativa SEVESO
   
   
 * Reglamentación APQ
   
   
 * Planes de Autoprotección
   
   
 * Análisis de Riesgos Industriales
   
   
 * Modelización de escenarios
   
   


Beneficios


🌱 ¿Qué ofrecemos?


   
   
 * Formación técnica especializada en consultoría industrial
   
   
 * Participación en proyectos reales con clientes industriales
   
   
 * Visión global de la normativa aplicable a instalaciones industriales
   
   
 * Tutorización individualizada
   
   
 * Posibilidad real de incorporación a la plantilla tras las prácticas, en función del desempeño y necesidades organizativas
   
   


💰 Ayuda económica


Se ofrece ayuda económica mensual acorde a dedicación y normativa universitaria.

title: Electrical Engineer intern
description:
👉 Acerca del empleo

En Enertis Applus+ estamos buscando un/a Electrical Engineer Intern para incorporarse a nuestro equipo de Ingeniería, reportando directamente al Responsable de Ingeniería.

🛠️ ¿Qué vas a hacer?

Tus Principales Responsabilidades Incluirán


 * Soporte en el área de diseño y producción
 * Soporte al área de oficina técnica e ingeniería de la propiedad en cualquiera de los alcances
 * Soporte en preparación de ofertas y especificaciones técnicas
 * Apoyo en el desarrollo e ingeniería de detalle en proyectos de construcción y en legalización de nuevas instalaciones Fotovoltaicas
   
   

🎯 ¿Qué estamos buscando?

Buscamos Talento, No La Perfección. Si Crees Que Puedes Aportar Al Equipo, Aunque Tu Perfil No Encaje Al 100%, Queremos Conocerte


 * Formación en Ingeniería Industrial, Eléctrica o Mecánica.
 * Nivel medio-alto de inglés. Principalmente con capacidad de lectura
 * Se requiere convenio con la universidad.
 * Estudiantes último curso o realizando el TFG, TFM.
   
   

🌍 ¿Qué ofrecemos?


 * Incorporarte a un equipo técnico consolidado y referente en el sector.
 * Oportunidades de crecimiento profesional con un plan de carrera definido.
 * Participar en una empresa en constante expansión.
 * Modalidad de trabajo híbrida o remota (según perfil y localización).
 * Horario flexible y excelente conciliación laboral y personal.
   
   

🤝 Diversidad e inclusión

En Enertis Applus+, promovemos un entorno de trabajo diverso, equitativo e inclusivo. Valoramos a todas las personas independientemente de su género, edad, origen, orientación sexual, capacidades o creencias. Apostamos por el talento sin etiquetas.

title: PMO Trainee
description:
Mission

Radisson Hotel Group is a leading hospitality company serving as a true host and best partner to guests, owners, business partners and talent. Our unique hotel brands offer award-winning and exceptional hotel experiences, originating from our strong Scandinavian heritage of design and innovation. Our brands embody our modern vision of hospitality, including authentic local tastes, stylish living design, unique locations and vibrant social scenes.

Radisson Hotel Group brings a refreshed commitment to hospitality leadership to meet the changing travel industry and the bespoke needs of our guests. We provide exceptional service in all of our hotels across the globe and strive to deliver a hospitality experience that is beyond guest expectations.

We are looking for an Administrative Trainee to provide essential support to the IT PMO team. This role is ideal for someone eager to learn project management processes while assisting with documentation, reporting, and operational tasks.

Role purpose:



 * To provide administrative and operational support to the IT PMO team.
 * To maintain and update project documentation and dashboards.
 * To prepare data and materials for approvals, and executive presentations.
 * To assist in coordinating meetings, agendas, and follow-up actions.
 * To support budget tracking.
   
   
   

To learn PMO methodologies and develop professional skills through hands-on experience.

Key Roles & Responsibilities



 * Maintain and update documentation current in SharePoint/Confluence.
 * Ensure all projects meet minimum documentation standards
 * Draft PowerPoint presentations for operational committees and dashboards.
 * Collect weekly project updates and format them for reporting.
 * Schedule follow-up meetings, book rooms, and send meeting minutes.
 * Gather data for approval requests and verify completeness.
 * Prepare draft purchase order requests and monitor status in procurement tools.
 * Check compliance with internal methodology and prepare audit checklists.
 * Create simple macros or Power BI/Excel automations for reporting.
 * Clean and validate data in portfolio tools (Jira, ServiceNow, Clarity, Monday).
 * Shadow PMs in meetings and study internal templates and methodologies.

title: Docente para el curso de Detección, Prevención y Gestión del Estrés.
description:
Únete a MSL Formación S.L., una empresa líder en formación profesional con sede en Madrid, como Docente para nuestro curso de “Escuela de Espalda”. En MSL, nos especializamos en proporcionar herramientas y servicios de capacitación personalizados en áreas como Nuevas Tecnologías, Programación, Diseño, Sistemas de Información, Redes y Gestión de Empresas. Habilidades, Sector sociosanitario...


.


Tareas


El curso ofrece una visión completa del estrés, su origen, sus efectos sobre la salud y el rendimiento, y las principales estrategias de prevención y afrontamiento tanto a nivel individual como organizacional.


1. ¿Qué es el estrés?


Se explica qué es el estrés, por qué se considera un fenómeno universal y cómo actúa como un mecanismo natural de supervivencia que prepara al organismo para afrontar demandas del entorno.


2. El estrés en la actualidad


Se analizan las principales causas actuales del estrés, cómo la percepción subjetiva influye en su intensidad, la relación entre estrés y cambios en el entorno, y las bases para reducir o disolver la respuesta estresante.


3. Dónde actúa el estrés


Incluye los fundamentos neurobiológicos: funcionamiento de los “tres cerebros”, cómo responde el sistema nervioso ante el estrés, las consecuencias más habituales y qué perfiles o colectivos lo sufren con mayor frecuencia.


4. Qué dice la medicina


Se revisan las aportaciones de autores clave en la investigación del estrés (Hans Selye, Holmes y Rosenman, entre otros), los primeros signos de alarma, las distintas clasificaciones del estrés según frecuencia y los indicadores clínicos más relevantes.


5. ¿El estrés siempre es maligno?


Diferencia entre eustrés (positivo) y distrés (negativo), la ley de Yerkes-Dodson sobre rendimiento y activación, síntomas del distrés crónico y cómo influyen la dificultad de las tareas y la capacidad personal de afrontamiento.


6. Aspectos clave que debemos conocer


Reflexiona sobre el impacto del estrés en el rendimiento, la rutina del profesional, el papel de la mente como herramienta principal, la importancia de las endorfinas y la relación entre bienestar y felicidad.


7. Cómo nos afecta el distrés


Explica las consecuencias del distrés en el individuo (físicas, emocionales y cognitivas), las diferencias personales en la vulnerabilidad al estrés, el burnout laboral y cómo el distrés perjudica a la organización, incluyendo la llamada “espiral diabólica”.


8. Cómo generamos nosotros mismos el distrés


Se detallan numerosos factores que contribuyen al estrés autogenerado: competitividad excesiva, organización del trabajo, exigencias del puesto, gestión del tiempo, perfeccionismo, multitarea, urgencias constantes, tecn estrés, teletrabajo, contratos precarios, situaciones de desempleo, entre otros.


9. El mobbing como principal generador de estrés


Se define el mobbing, sus efectos, los tipos de acosadores, las causas más comunes, las fases del acoso, la intervención jerárquica, los errores de diagnóstico y los diferentes tipos de acciones hostiles. También se analiza el “caldo de cultivo” que facilita su aparición.


10. El estrés laboral


Incluye datos sobre los trabajadores, los costes del estrés en las organizaciones y una revisión de los estresores laborales más frecuentes.


11. Cómo prevenir el estrés


Presenta herramientas de análisis personal, técnicas de gestión emocional y acciones preventivas tanto en el plano individual como en el plano organizacional.


12. Cómo combatir el estrés


Se exponen las estrategias de afrontamiento activas una vez aparece el estrés, con intervenciones aplicables a nivel personal y medidas que pueden implementarse en la organización para reducir su impacto.


Requisitos


1. Formación académica (obligatoria)


   
   
 * Licenciatura, Grado o Ciclo Formativo de Grado Superior, preferiblemente del área sanitaria,
   
   


o cualificación profesional equivalente directamente relacionada con el contenido del curso.


2. Experiencia profesional


   
   
 * Experiencia acreditable mínima de 1 año en la materia a impartir,
   
   si no se dispone de acreditación oficial para la docencia del curso.
   
   


3. Competencia docente (imprescindible cumplir uno de estos requisitos):


El docente debe contar con al menos 300 horas de experiencia como formador,

o poseer una de las siguientes titulaciones/habilitaciones:


   
   
 * 
   
   
   Máster de Profesorado (MAES).
   

   
   
 * 
   
   
   Titulaciones universitarias de perfil pedagógico:
   

   
   
 * 
   
   
   Magisterio
   

   
   
 * 
   
   
   Psicología
   

   
   
 * 
   
   
   Psicopedagogía
   

   
   
 * 
   
   
   Pedagogía
   

   
   
 * 
   
   
   CAP – Certificado de Aptitud Pedagógica.
   

   
   
 * 
   
   
   Certificado de Profesionalidad “Docencia de la Formación Profesional para el Empleo” (o equivalente).
   

   
   


Beneficios


Formar parte de un equipo docente con muchas poosibilidades de proyeccion

title: Junior Electronics Engineer
description:
About the Role
Imagine starting the line of your aerospace career, working side by side with senior engineers and learning how complex systems come together in real flight hardware. This role is designed for junior electronics engineers who want to grow fast, learn by doing, and evolve into full system engineers while contributing to real defense programs from day one.

At Destinus, we are revolutionizing the defense industry with cutting-edge Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). Our innovative technologies are designed to meet the unique demands of modern defense operations, delivering unparalleled speed, precision, and cost effectiveness. Destinus partners with government agencies and defense organizations worldwide to provide advanced solutions for mission-critical operations, enabling a new era of efficiency and technological superiority. Join us in shaping the future of defense with groundbreaking aerospace innovations.

What You´ll Do

 * Support senior and lead engineers in day-to-day electronic and system engineering activities across multiple programs
 * Assist in the integration of electronic subsystems into larger aerospace systems
 * Participating actively in test preparation including setup of hardware, instrumentation, and test configurations
 * Provide hands-on support during testing activities, including execution, monitoring, and basic troubleshooting
 * Collect, organize, and analyze test data to support engineering evaluations and design improvements
 * Help identify issues during testing and collaborate with senior engineers to investigate root causes
 * Contribute to the creation, update, and maintenance of technical documentation and test reports
 * Support continuous improvement initiatives within the engineering and testing processes
 * Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams such as software, mechanical, and test engineers to ensure smooth system integration
 * Gradually take ownership of defined tasks and subsystems as technical knowledge and confidence grows
 * Learn system engineering principles through real project exposure with a clear path toward becoming a system engineer
   
   

Requirements



What You'll Need

 * Academic background in Electronics Engineering or a closely related field
 * Fluency in both Spanish and English with the ability to work confidently in technical environments
 * A proactive attitude, mindset and strong desire to learn in a fast-moving engineering environment

Would be a plus

 * Familiar with avionics and systems such as autopilot, radar altimeter, air data units, magnetometers, AHRS, GPS, anti jamming and anti spoofing solutions, and servos
 * Availability to support Ground and Flight-testing activities.
 * Experienced in updating firmware in avionics and system components
 * Able to create electrical drawings to support engineering upgrades using tools such as AutoCAD Electrical, Zuken E3, or similar CAD software
 * Familiar with version control systems
 * Knowledge of networking concepts including TCP and UDP
 * Basic experience with Python scripting and Linux Ubuntu commands
 * Familiar with serial communication protocols such as RS232, RS422, RS485, and Ethernet
 * Hands on experience with ground support equipment including multimeter, megohmmeter, oscilloscope, spectrum analyzer, power meter, and data loggers
 * Experience with radio control or FPV drones as a personal hobby
   

Who You Are

You are at the beginning of your engineering journey and hungry to learn. You enjoy working alongside experienced engineers, asking questions, and getting your hands dirty with real hardware. You are adaptable, curious, and comfortable switching between theory and practice. When faced with something new, you lean in instead of stepping back.

 



Benefits



Why Join Us?

✨ The Thrill of the Future - Work on cutting-edge projects that redefine aerospace.
✨ Global Innovation Hub - Collaborate with top engineers from all over the world.
✨ Fast-Paced & High-Growth - Experience the rush of working in a rapidly expanding company.
✨ Real Impact - Your work won't be theoretical—it will shape the future of flight.

Destinus is an equal-opportunity employer. We value diversity in our companies and our teams and do not discriminate based on age, race, religion, color, country of origin, gender, sexual orientation, or disability status.

🚀 Destinus - Challenge the limits of time, space, and human potential.

title: FPGA engineer (Internship). Granada, Spain
description:
We're looking for a R&D Engineer to join our Technology Exploration Unit team in Granada, Spain.

Our Technology

We’re the world leader in Resilient Positioning, Navigation and Timing (R-PNT) solutions that improve the reliability, performance and safety of critical applications, and high-risk operations, even in GPS/GNSS denied environments. We provide virtually fail-safe GNSS and PNT solutions for military and commercial applications worldwide.

We provide ultra-precise synchronization devices (sub-ns) and frequency distribution for applications that require a high degree of reliability and precision by enabling different technological solutions based on the White-Rabbit PTP or other timing protocols.

In addition, SED Spain has extensive expertise in Time Sensitive Networking through several works carried out in the framework of aerospace with ESA to provide deterministic communications with no packet loss. We provide highly innovative elements and dependable solutions with time at the essence.

The Position

As an R&D engineer, you will be a key member of our Technology Exploration Unit team in Granada Spain (part of the R&T Research and Technology Unit that is distributed between Granada Spain and Rochester US).

You are expected to perform tasks related to early technical developments as technology exploration tasks, which is key for the company to be able to evaluate and master technologies considered key for future products and services. The position will also be related to research projects and grants in which the Engineer will address also the technical project management tasks.

What You’ll Be Doing


 * You will have responsibility for understanding requirements, developing a project scheduling in innovation projects.
 * In collaboration with our Grants and Quality teams, you will ensure that your developments are produced according to the specifications.
 * We are all about improvement, so you will be able to identify improvement opportunities for new technologies, product performance, efficiency and coverage.
 * You will use your critical thinking and problem-solving skills to ensure the highest quality for the results according with scheduling, effort and budget.
 * You will work with the latest and greatest in Resilient PNT and deterministic technologies!
 * You will have effective communication with other project partners, project managers and will be constantly communicating with them from project kick-offs to stakeholder meetings.
 * You will participate in internal meetings to build a comprehensive work plan and manage the budget and personnel effort for projects.
 * You will write deliverables, dissemination material, and assist in communication activities related to the project as well as to attend to international workshops and other events of interest.
   
   

What You Bring To Safran


 * Graduate’s Degree in Telecommunications, Software Engineering, Computer Science or related field. Master’s Degree is highly recommendable.
 * Excellent written and dissemination skills in English (advanced Cambridge certificate or similar, at least similar speaking skills).
 * Technical skills in general software development, embedded Linux, software engineering, FPGA design, firmware modules, and Linux kernel driver development and debugging.
 * Recommended experience in R&D projects.
 * Required experience in:
    * Knowledge of Xilinx FPGA development tools and platforms would be valuable (Vivado, Vitis, HLS, …). FPGA logic design and simulation (VHDL/Verilog)
    * Experience in embedded software development, testing, and debugging.
    * Knowledge of embedded Linux generation tools and build systems (e.g., Buildroot, Petalinux, …).

 * Desirable experience in:
    * Development and design of telecommunication networks.
    * Knowledge of Ethernet networking: link layer protocols, MAC design and operation, Ethernet switching, VLAN and 802.1Q standards.
    * Timing, synchronization and frequency dissemination (PTP, NTP, SyncE, or other timing transfer protocols).
    * Previous knowledge of the Xilinx device architecture and platforms, e.g., Zynq-7000, UltraScale, Zynq-MPSoC, is also desirable.
      

The Keys Of Our Offer


 * Be part of a leading and expanding company.
 * Being able to explore the more advanced technologies in this field.
 * Health insurance.
 * Flexible work schedule.
 * International and dynamic environment in Granada, Spain.
 * High possibilities to grow inside the company.
 * Professional Career Plan.

title: Development trainee
description:
Empresa farmacéutica líder internacional.

Nuestra misión es descubrir nuevas formas de mejorar y prolongar la vida de las personas. Utilizando nuestras propias investigaciones, desarrollamos medicamentos innovadores en áreas terapéuticas como: cardiometabólica, oftalmología, respiratoria, neurociencia, dermatología e inmunología y oncología.

Estamos aquí para servir a las personas, las comunidades y los pacientes. Al reimaginar la medicina, continuaremos transformando las vidas de millones de personas. Es nuestro propósito el que nos impulsa; que nos inspira; eso nos desafía. Y es por eso que nunca nos rendiremos.




Programa Ubloom

Programa de prácticas pensado para que los estudiantes puedan aprender de sus primeras experiencias profesionales, donde puedan descubrir nuestra aspiración y qué nos impulsa a reimaginar la medicina.

Descripción departamento y área terapéutica: Development Spain es un Centro de Excelencia que impulsa el desarrollo de medicamentos innovadores a través de equipos multidisciplinares en áreas clave como Operaciones Clínicas, Regulatory Affairs, Seguridad del Paciente o Global Medical Affairs.

Se valorarán las siguientes skills:

¿Qué funciones realizarás?

¿Qué ofrecemos?

● Estancia en empresa incluyendo programa de formación inicial, tutorización y mentorización continua por parte de profesionales especializados y seguimiento constante por el equipo de RRHH

title: SEO & Content Intern
description:
About Ukio |

We are one of the most promising startups of 2026 with headquarters in Spain. We were founded in Barcelona, and since then, we've expanded to include offices in Madrid, Lisbon, Berlin, Milan and Paris. This is only the beginning as we've got our sights set on spreading to the rest of Europe and later to include other continents as well 🚀.

Ukio's mission is to empower individuals to live where they want, when they want 🌎. We do this by disrupting the traditional residential real estate market, providing fully furnished and artfully designed apartments for stays starting at one month. We remove all the hassle around finding a rental with no long-term contracts, security deposits, broker fees, moving/buying furniture, etc., giving choice and flexibility to allow people to plant their roots anywhere 💥.

Backed by Europe's best Venture Capital firms, this year will be vital in our growth as we look to further build out our team, further establish ourselves in our current markets, and expand our reach into multiple new markets 🔥. We are currently ranked in the top 10 startups in Spain by Linkedin, and we have successfully raised a Series A investment round of €27 million that will help propel our growth throughout Western Europe and bring us closer to reaching our goals🥇.

Our culture |

We honor diversity, compassion, and honesty above all else in our team. We've already got a great mix of dedicated, collaborative, and results-driven people and are looking for more like minded folks to join our team. In true startup fashion, we always embrace the unknown and grant full autonomy to our team members to act as the owners of their projects and tasks. We are creators who embrace dynamic environments and take on and build up projects from scratch.

Our team is composed of everyone from foodies to athletes, adventure seekers to art buffs. We know fun, and we always have a team event on our calendars, so are you ready to join us?

Role |

We are looking for an SEO & Content Intern to support the creation, optimization, and publication of web content across multiple markets. The intern will work closely with the SEO team and collaborate with marketing and other departments to help scale content production efficiently using AI tools and structured workflows.

This role combines content creation, SEO execution, and operational coordination, making it ideal for someone interested in digital marketing, content strategy, and AI-assisted workflows.

Responsibilities |

Content Creation & Optimization


 * Create SEO-oriented content using AI tools under SEO guidelines
 * Proofread and improve AI-generated copy to ensure quality, tone consistency, and accuracy
 * Translate and adapt English content into Spanish while maintaining SEO intent
 * Assist in defining content structures
   
   

SEO Support


 * Support keyword-based content creation
 * Optimize existing content following SEO best practices
 * Help maintain consistency across pages and markets
   
   

Content Publishing


 * Publish and update webpages using Webflow
 * Format content correctly for readability and SEO performance
 * Ensure pages follow internal templates and structure standards
   
   

Project Coordination


 * Coordinate with internal teams to gather information needed for new pages
 * Follow up on content requirements and timelines
 * Help manage content workflows and documentation
   
   

Data & Operations Support


 * Work with Google Sheets to organize content lists, track progress, and handle raw data
 * Support basic data analysis related to content performance or content planning
   
   

About you |


 * Fluent in English and Spanish
 * Strong writing and proofreading skills
 * Interest in SEO, content marketing, and digital marketing
 * Comfortable using AI tools for content generation and editing
 * Organized and detail-oriented
 * Comfortable working with Google Sheets
 * Previous experience with CMS platforms is a plus
 * Basic understanding of keyword research
 * Basic analytical mindset when working with data
   
   

Ukio's life benefits |


 * Transportation card (transportation coverage for role that have traveling needed for their work tasks according to the internal policy)
 * Breakfast at the office, fruits, nutrition bars, free coffee/tea and popcorn!
 * An amazing internal culture and no dress code!
 * International working environment with many different nationalities!
   
   

Ukio's culture promotes and values each individual's contribution. Diversity and inclusion, it's a big topic for us, as such we encourage applications from individuals of all backgrounds, regardless of age, gender, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, socio-economic background, religion and/or belief.

Sky's the limit for us. We're here to revolutionize your life. Be part of this revolution 🔥

We look forward to receiving your application!

For more information about Ukio, visit us at www.ukio.com and to keep up to date with UKIO's news, follow us on LinkedIn and Instagram!

title: Fraud & Operations Internship
description:
Why us?


 * We trust our team and we are goal oriented
 * Paid internship: 800 euros gross per month with a 6 month duration, full-time.
 * Starting date: March 2026
 * A hands-on Tutor to help you learn and grow
 * People. Work with talented, committed and supportive teammates
 * International work environment with more than 16 nationalities
 * No politics or bureaucracy. Only a great environment for you to achieve your best work
 * Potential for future employment opportunities based on performance and company growth.
   
   

Your mission

Within our Trust & Safety team, you will participate in payment and verification processes. Some of the tasks will include:


 * Payment Disputes, you will learn about our operations and how to manage specific situations.
 * Learn about the daily operations in the team, our business, and how we keep it all safe.
 * Handle Trust and Safety cases related to Spotahome Guarantee - claims handling.
 * Support Landlords & Tenants on payment processes including collection activities.
   
   

Your profile


 * Fluency in English and native Spanish language
 * Based in Madrid
 * Interest in technology, property and travel industry
 * Organisational skills and the ability to multitask.
 * Agility and the desire to learn
 * Being able to sign University agreement
   
   

About Us

Spotahome is an international online marketplace which offers verified rental accommodation across 100 European cities in 27 countries and with a global ambition. Spotahome began as a start-up created in 2014 by 4 friends with a vision to revolutionise the traditional real estate space starting with digitalising rentals.

At Spotahome we make renting easy by allowing people to book completely online from wherever they are in the world, with the knowledge that the property they are booking is real and accurate. We are the only ones sending “Homecheckers” to make videos, floorplans, and photos to the almost 100,000 properties across Europe.

So far we’ve helped over 150,000 renters find their perfect home – no more traditional viewings, no more time-wasting, just easy online renting!

We are backed by some of the most highly reputed international investors from Silicon Valley, the UK, and Spain; having raised €80+ Million to date.

title: Translations Specialist Intern
description:
Spanish Translations Specialist Junior

Who We Are

BTS is a leading consulting and leadership development firm that empowers organizations to achieve tangible results through people development initiatives.

Resilience

title: Internship Beca Sistema industrial & Flujos
description:
Sobre Nosotros

HORSE es un líder global en la industria automotriz, dedicado a ser pionero en soluciones de energía de bajas emisiones y combustibles alternativos. Con presencia en siete países, nuestra misión es impulsar la transición hacia un futuro sostenible desarrollando sistemas de propulsión de última generación, híbridos, sintéticos y alimentados por hidrógeno. Creemos en un enfoque pragmático para la descarbonización, reconociendo que no existe una solución única para la movilidad sostenible.

En el corazón de nuestro éxito están nuestras personas. Fomentamos una cultura de innovación, colaboración e inclusión, asegurando que cada miembro del equipo se sienta valorado y empoderado. Nuestra presencia global no solo impulsa el avance tecnológico, sino que también genera oportunidades de crecimiento personal y profesional.

Únete a nosotros en HORSE y forma parte de un equipo que está transformando el futuro de la movilidad, mientras construyes una carrera que importa.

Lo que harás

Aprendizaje de las herramientas para la digitalización y construcción de gemelos digitales de los sistemas industriales de las factorías.

Creación de los modelos 3D de los medios industriales para el correcto diseño de los procesos de nuestros gemelos digitales.

Desarrollo de los modelos estadísticos necesarios para el correcto funcionamiento de los procesos nuestros gemelos digitales.

Colaborar con los equipos para asegurar la integridad y precisión de los datos.

Análisis critico de los datos aportados sobre los procesos productivos.

Resolver problemas técnicos relacionados con la digitalización y creación de gemelos digitales.

Identificar oportunidades para mejorar la eficiencia de los sistemas industriales a través de los modelos desarrollados.

Desarrollar guías y manuales para el uso de las herramientas desarrolladas.

Lo que buscamos

Grado en Ingeniería Industrial, Mecánica, Electrónica, Eléctrica, Diseño Industrial, Informática, Organización Industrial.

Idiomas: Inglés.

Aplicaciones informáticas: Paquete Office avanzado, Catia, AutoCAD.

Lo que ofrecemos

Prácticas remuneradas (600 €/mes para estudiantes, 800 €/mes para titulados).

Proyecto formativo de 6 meses, 40 horas semanales, en horario continuado de 7.00 h a 15.00 h. (con posibilidad de flexibilizar a 30 o 35 horas).

Plan de acogida y formación por parte de los mejores profesionales del sector de la automoción.

Buen ambiente laboral, dentro de una empresa innovadora, diversa y multicultural.

Posibilidad de transporte gratuito en autocar de empresa.
