title: TRAINEE FINANCE
description:
Mission

Support the finance control of Global Commercial Operations (GCO which includes all affiliates and Global Partner Markets), ensuring proper monitoring and financial support for decision-making. We seek a curious, proactive individual who is eager to learn about finance and the pharmaceutical sector and who will actively engage with both local and global teams to drive continuous improvement.

Functions And Responsibilities


 * Financial Management: Collaborate in the financial management of the GCO area (MCs and Global Partner Markets) by continuously reviewing and monitoring profit and loss accounts (i.e., sales tracking, product profitability, promotional sensitivity, OPEX and evaluation and management of new projects).
 * Support to Business Controllers: Assist GCO team members (Manager and Business Controllers) in providing financial support to the areas under their responsibility (Finance Business Partnership) as well as in managing cross-functional projects (interactions with Local & Global teams).
 * Financial Planning: Assist in preparing and follow-up of the short-term planning (month follow-up) and medium-term planning exercises (Budget, 5YFCST).
 * Information Consolidation: Participate in consolidating the financial information of the operational area.
 * Ad-Hoc Reports: Prepare ad-hoc financial information for the department and support the continuous improvement of internal & external reporting.
 * Others: Support the monitoring and improvement of internal control processes, ensuring consistency and validation of the financial information of the subsidiaries under your responsibility.
   
   

Profile


 * Naturally curious and proactive, with a strong desire to learn and grow within the finance and pharmaceutical sectors.
 * Comfortable working in a dynamic & international environment and engaging with colleagues from various backgrounds.
 * Proactive, self-driven, resourceful and eager to take initiative.
 * Organized person.
   
   

Education


 * Degree in Economics, Business Administration, or similar.
 * Additional training is a plus (MBA or postgraduate, master’s degree) but not needed.
   
   

Specific Knowledge


 * High level of Power BI and Excel.
 * Advanced user of SAP is a plus.
 * Good communication and presentation skills.
 * High level of English (spoken and written).
   
   

Experience


 * Familiarity with the issuance and analysis of economic-financial reporting.
 * Experience in the pharmaceutical sector or an audit background is considered a plus
   
   

Support the finance control of Global Commercial Operations (GCO which includes all affiliates and Global Partner Markets), ensuring proper monitoring and financial support for decision-making. We seek a curious, proactive individual who is eager to learn about finance and the pharmaceutical sector and who will actively engage with both local and global teams to drive continuous improvement.

Why work with Almirall?

We are a people-centric company where employees are at their best, patients and customer are at the heart of every decision, and our focus and agility allow us to deliver greater impact for all.

Additionally, for the 17th year in a row, we have been certified as Top Employer Spain, and also Top Employer Germany for the first time.

This strengthens our commitment to create a unique work environment that helps our employees to develop their skills to fullest and grow both professionally and as individuals.

We are delighted to have a great team that is proactive, innovative, and eager to transform the world of people with skin conditions.

We are proud of each one of our employees, their development, and growth: they are the success of the company.

Our purpose

"Transform the patients' world by helping them realize their hopes & dreams for a healthy life".

Our values


 * Care: we listen & empathize, we value diverse perspectives & backgrounds and we help each other succeed.
 * Courage: we challenge the status quo, we take full ownership and we learn from our success & failures.
 * Innovation: we put the patient and customer at the center, we create novel solutions and we empower entrepreneurial mindsets.
 * Simplicity: we act decisively and avoid over-analysis, we understand why before we act and we are agile & keep things simple.
   
   

At Almirall, it’s all about people!

#wearealmirall

title: Graduate privacy counsel (AI and product)
description:
At Bending Spoons, we’re striving to build one of the all-time great companies. A company that serves a huge number of customers. A company where team members grow to their full potential. A company that functions at unparalleled levels of effectiveness and efficiency. A company that creates value for shareowners at an extraordinary rate. And a company that does so while adhering to high ethical standards.

To achieve this objective, we execute the following strategy: We acquire a digital business with untapped potential and make it as successful as we can by leveraging our platform—which comprises our expertise, technologies, data, brand, talents, and company culture. Then, we invest the proceeds into making our platform more powerful, and into acquiring new businesses. Thus, our strategy sees us combine an investor’s attention to capital allocation with the hands-on approach of an operator.

For a talented, driven, and collaborative individual, working at Bending Spoons is an opportunity to learn, make an impact, and progress their career at an exceptionally high rate. That’s our promise to such a candidate.

If you’re still studying or completing your legal traineeship, don’t worry—if the selection process goes well, we’re happy to wait until you’re done.

title: TRAINEE VIDEO EDITOR/MOTION GRAPHER
description:
We are WPP Production - the unified global production company that brings together all of WPP's content producers, studios and craft experts into one connected organisation. We combine world-class human craft with next generation technology to originate, design, and deliver multi-channel content systems at scale. Built for borderless collaboration and powered by deep craft expertise, we are the production engine designed for today's always on, AI driven marketing world.

WPP Production is part of WPP. WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients, and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com

Responsibilities


 * Support in the video editing department.
 * Support in the planning and coordination of the complete processes of film, video and television editing and post-production, controlling the state and availability of equipment and materials, carrying out the editing by integrating post-production tools, according to the indications of the director or producer, providing their own criteria.
 * Use of specific tools for editing and finalising videos and spots.
 * Preparing the necessary materials for editing and post-production.
 * Support in the coordination of the final editing and post-production processes until the final audiovisual product is generated.
 * Help in the coordination with the rest of the team for the production of audiovisual works.
   
   

Requirements


 * High knowledge in editing.
 * Knowledge and handling of Premiere, DaVinci, After Effects, Photoshop.
 * Previous experience in video editing for advertising will be an asset.
 * Knowledge and/or interest in other post-production processes would be an asset: VFX composition, 3D modelling or Motion Graphics.
 * It´s essential to be able to sign an agreement with the School or University (Important: the agreement must be covered by an official entity or associated/attached to a University).
   
   

Conditions


 * Dynamic and creative work environment
 * International company with great growth potential
 * On-site practices with possibility of telecommuting
 * Access to training
 * 25 hours per week (5 hours daily between 9:00 and 18:00)
 * Study aid 300€/month
   
   

Why work here:

At WPP Production, you’ll help shape the future of content production at a truly global scale. We bring together world-class talent, cutting-edge studios, and advanced technology to solve some of the most complex creative and production challenges in the industry. You’ll work in a collaborative, borderless environment where craft excellence is valued, innovation is encouraged, and AI and next-generation tools are used to amplify not replace human creativity. With access to diverse projects, global career opportunities, and the backing of WPP’s unmatched network, this is a place where you can grow your skills, make real impact, and create work that performs for every audience, across every channel, at every moment.

Inclusion and Impact

WPP is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.

Data

We rely on legitimate interest as a legal basis for processing personal information under the GDPR for purposes of recruitment and applications for employment. When you click the "Submit Application" button at the bottom of this page, this will send all the information you have added to WPP Production. Before you do this, we think it's a good idea to read through our Privacy statement. This explains what we do with your personal data when you apply for a role with us, and, how you can update the information you have provided us with or how to remove it.

Please contact careers@wppproduction.com if you need the job advert or form in another format.

title: Practicante Profesional en Desarrollo de Software Automatización e IA
description:
En Sharkally, empresa especializada en automatización e inteligencia artificial (IA), buscamos un practicante profesional con interés en desarrollo de software y procesos digitales para apoyar proyectos tecnológicos orientados tanto al sector público (administración pública y licitaciones) como al sector privado.


Trabajarás directamente con el equipo fundador participando en proyectos reales, con foco en automatización, análisis y ejecución técnica.


Tareas

   
   
 * Apoyar en el desarrollo y mejora de soluciones de automatización de procesos.
   
   
 * Colaborar en la integración de herramientas tecnológicas (APIs, plataformas digitales, flujos automatizados).
   
   
 * Apoyar en el análisis técnico de requerimientos para proyectos del sector público y privado.
   
   
 * Documentar procesos, flujos y soluciones técnicas.
   
   
 * Apoyar en pruebas, validación y optimización de soluciones desarrolladas.
   
   
 * Participar en proyectos relacionados con licitaciones, plataformas digitales y procesos administrativos automatizados.
   
   


Requisitos

   
   
 * Estudiante o egresado reciente de Ingeniería de Sistemas, Software, Informática o afines.
   
   
 * Interés en automatización, desarrollo de software e inteligencia artificial.
   
   
 * Conocimientos básicos en lógica de programación (Python, JavaScript u otro lenguaje similar).
   
   
 * Manejo básico de herramientas digitales (Google Workspace, documentación técnica).
   
   
 * Capacidad de análisis, orden y atención al detalle.
   
   
 * Actitud proactiva y ganas de aprender en un entorno startup.
   
   


Beneficios


Trabajo 100% remoto.


Horario flexible compatible con estudios.


Formación práctica en procesos reales.


Participación en proyectos con impacto directo en clientes.


¿Por qué Sharkally?


Porque participarás en proyectos reales de desarrollo de software y automatización, trabajando con tecnologías actuales aplicadas a casos de negocio reales. Aprenderás cómo se diseña, desarrolla y despliega una solución desde cero hasta su entrega final, colaborando directamente con el equipo y ganando experiencia práctica en automatización e inteligencia artificial.

title: HR Trainee
description:
Sobre el Hotel Miiro Borneta

Ubicado en el encantador barrio del Born, en pleno corazón de la Ciutat Vella de Barcelona, el Miiro Borneta Hotel cuenta con 92 habitaciones, un restaurante con cocina abierta, una coctelería y una espectacular terraza en la azotea con vistas al centro de la ciudad. Somos un hotel con personalidad, estilo y un ambiente dinámico, donde el trabajo en equipo y la experiencia del huésped y del empleado son igual de importantes.

Sobre la posición

Buscamos un/a estudiante en prácticas que quiera iniciarse en el mundo de los Recursos Humanos formando parte del equipo de People & Culture del Hotel Miiro Borneta. Esta es una excelente oportunidad para aprender de forma práctica en un entorno internacional y moderno dentro del sector hotelero.

Como HR Trainee, darás soporte en diferentes áreas del departamento: selección, onboarding, formación, gestión administrativa y comunicación interna, siempre acompañado/a y guiado/a por profesionales con experiencia.


 * Importante:** Esta posición es exclusivamente para estudiantes que puedan firmar un convenio de prácticas con una universidad o centro de estudios.
   
   

Responsabilidades principales


 * Apoyo en procesos de selección: publicación de ofertas, cribado de CVs y coordinación de entrevistas.
 * Participación en el onboarding de nuevos empleados y preparación de materiales de bienvenida.
 * Ayuda en la organización de eventos internos y actividades para fomentar el buen ambiente laboral.
 * Mantenimiento y actualización de la base de datos de empleados y documentación del departamento.
 * Soporte administrativo general en tareas del día a día del departamento.
 * Colaboración en la elaboración de informes (rotación de personal, formación, etc.).
 * Apoyo en la coordinación de formaciones junto con la Group L&D Manager.
 * Actualización del tablón de anuncios y documentación interna (FAQs, procedimientos, etc.).
 * Gestión básica de materiales como botiquines y asignación de taquillas.
 * Atención a consultas internas sencillas y soporte en iniciativas de bienestar y comunicación.
   
   

Perfil que buscamos


 * Estudiante de grado o máster en Recursos Humanos, Psicología, ADE, Turismo o similar.
 * Posibilidad de firmar convenio de prácticas con universidad o centro de estudios.
 * Actitud proactiva, ganas de aprender y de formar parte de un equipo dinámico.
 * Buenas habilidades de comunicación y organización.
 * Nivel medio-alto de español e inglés.
 * Manejo básico de herramientas Office (Word, Excel, Outlook).
 * Discreción y sensibilidad para tratar información confidencial.
   
   

¿Qué ofrecemos?


 * Formación práctica y real en todas las áreas clave del departamento de People & Culture.
 * Ambiente de trabajo joven, multicultural y con buenas vibras.
 * Apoyo y acompañamiento continuo durante toda la práctica.
 * Participación en iniciativas que contribuyen a mejorar la experiencia de nuestro equipo.
 * Comidas gratuitas durante los días de práctica.
 * Acceso a cursos de formación interna para potenciar tu desarrollo profesional.
 * Ayuda al estudio de 450 € brutos mensuales durante el período de prácticas.

title: Business Development & Sales Engineering Intern (6 months)
description:
Business Development & Sales Engineering Internship - (6 months)

📍 Location: Gracia, Barcelona (On-site)

📅 Availability: 30-40 hours per week

🌍 Languages: English + (Any Asian language/Arabic preferred)

About AudioStack

AudioStack is revolutionizing the way brands and businesses create audio content at scale. Our AI-powered platform enables the seamless generation and customization of high-quality audio (complete with voiceovers, SFX and music beds). We work with leading global brands, agencies, and developers, helping them unlock the full potential of audio automation.

What You'll Do

As a Business Development & Sales Engineering Intern, you will play a crucial role in supporting AudioStack's market expansion across APAC and MENA. This internship is perfect for a business-savvy student with a strong interest in technology, looking to gain hands-on experience in both business development and technical sales engineering.

Your responsibilities will include:

✅ GTM & Sales Engineering Support - Designing and executing go-to market strategies for South East Asia/ Middle East countries and learning how to master AudioStack's tools to support technical sales, including using APIs to create client demos.

✅ Market Research & Penetration - Identifying key opportunities and potential partners in your native country, helping drive strategic market entry/expansion.

✅ Sales Demonstrations - Creating interactive demos showcasing AudioStack's capabilities to potential clients and outreaching to form a healthy sales funnel

✅ Cross-functional Collaboration - Working closely with the Sales, Marketing, and Product teams to align strategies and improve client experience.

✅ Client Engagement & Relationship Building - Assisting in establishing meaningful relationships with existing clients, brands and agencies.

What We're Looking For

✔️ Business-minded with a technical edge - You have a keen interest in business growth and sales but are also open to learning the technical side (e.g., APIs, front-end demos).

✔️ Tech-savvy or eager to learn - Comfortable working with digital tools and platforms, and excited to explore the AI Audio field

✔️ Strong communicator & relationship builder - You enjoy networking, engaging and building relationships with clients.

✔️ Multilingual is a huge plus! - English fluency is a must, but proficiency in any Asian language or Arabic will give you a strong advantage.

✔️ Availability to work on-site in Barcelona - This is an in-person/hybrid role in our Barcelona office.

✔️ (Bonus Points if you have an audio background/understanding of audio)

What You'll Gain

🚀 Hands-on experience in business development within a fast-growing AI audio tech company.

💡 The opportunity to work closely with international clients across the world.

📈 Exposure to technical sales and API-driven client solutions.

🌍 A dynamic and collaborative work environment in Barcelona's innovation hub.

Benefits

🎛 The opportunity to work in a leading voice & audio AI company, with an exceptional tech team with diverse and highly recognised backgrounds.

🎹 Be part of a great story: we are making audio scalable for the first time in history.

📔 Great Learning & Development opportunities, such as our biweekly journal club - state-of-the-art papers or Friday wins, a proactive meeting to celebrate shipping of new software each week.

⏱ Hybrid working and Flexible working hours with 3 days in the office per week.

🛠 The opportunity to shape a startup culture in a company in the fast-growing audio/video space.

🗺 A truly international and diverse team.

🥵 Offices in the hottest startup hubs London, Barcelona and New York.

🐶 Dog friendly offices (come and meet Swanson and Bernie)!

Why is now a really exciting time to join AudioStack 🚀

AudioStack is the leading Audio-As-A-Service company with a very strong technology stack and AI R&D team, featured in some of the leading media.

We have a great team and culture and you will be immersive in a very international environment and market.

We are still a small team of 40+ people expanding rapidly internationally. As an early employee you have a lot of room to apply and grow your skills fast, build out a team and move quickly with your ideas, enjoying a lot of space, flexibility and trust.

🚀 Join us now to revolutionise how audio production is delivered at scale!

Our commitment to diversity 💗

We embrace diversity at www.audiostack.ai. To build a product that's loved by everyone, we need a team with all kinds of different perspectives, experiences, and backgrounds. That's why we're committed to hiring people regardless of race, religion, colour, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age or disability.

title: INVESTIGADOR/A JUNIOR (COMPUTER VISION / AI JUNIOR RESEARCHER)
companyName: Centre Tecnològic de la Química a Catalunya
description:
EURECAT

Eurecat is the second Research & Technology Organisation in Spain and one of the largest applied research and technology transfer organisation in Southern

Europe. It brings together the experience of more than 800 professionals who generate an annual turnover of 69 million euros and provides services to more than 2,000 companies. Eurecat integrates advanced digital capabilities and experience in biotechnology, industry and sustainability and collaborates with industry in R+D+I activities and projects, offering advanced scientific and technological services and specialized knowledge to respond effectively to the technological needs of very different business sectors, accelerating innovation, reducing both risks and spendings on scientific and technological infrastructures. The technology center participates in more than 200 large national and international consortium projects of high strategic R&I, has 230 patents and 10 spin-offs. Eurecat has eleven centers in Catalonia and presence in Madrid, Malaga and Chile.

Job Description

The Multimedia Technologies unit is formed by the Image and Audio research groups, as well as the Interactive Visualization development group.

The Image group has expertise in applied research and development of computer vision technologies, including video processing, 3D reconstruction, image generation or earth observation algorithms. In particular, the team has extensive experience of more than 10 years in applied artificial intelligence systems such as object detection and semantic segmentation for autonomous driving, monoscopic 360 depth estimation in audiovisual post-production, cross-modal generative models including video, or satellite imaging enhancement. It has participated in several international projects (Autopost, 3Flex, Möbius), national (Framework, Look4You, AI4ES), regional (ViVIM, Mironins) as well as in several projects for private clients.

Eurecat wishes to incorporate into its Area of MULTIMEDIA TECHNOLOGY located in Barcelona a:

COMPUTER VISION / AI JUNIOR RESEARCHER

Functions And Responsabilities


 * Preparation of technical proposals.
 * Problem design and solving, state-of-the-art analysis.
 * Experimentation and validation of methodologies.
 * Writing technical reports and scientific papers.
   
   

Requirements

KNOWLEDGE AND STUDIES:


 * Candidates should have a degree and a master on computer science or related field, in particular machine learning and ideally computer vision.
 * The Master's thesis is expected to be focused on Computer Vision.
   
   

EXPERIENCE (Nice To Have)


 * Academic or professional experience in research or applied projects related with computer vision.
 * Experience with deep learning frameworks and Tools (PyTorch+CUDA, TFlow, Tensorboard,...)
 * Advanced skills in Python and bash scripting, clean writing, clean code maintenance.
 * Other programming languages such as C++ or frameworks such as OpenCV or Slurm will be valuated positively.
 * Linux companion and Git should be in your daily toolbox.
 * Proved background in developing tools in the Media, Culture, and Arts sector is also valuable.
   
   

Languages


 * Mandatory: English
 * Highly desirable: Spanish or Catalan

title: Beca Coordinación de Programas
description:
ISDI es una escuela de negocio cuya misión es contribuir a la transformación digital generando un ecosistema competitivo a través de la formación de profesionales digitales, la promoción del talento digital, la difusión del conocimiento y el apoyo a emprendedores/as y empresas.




Como parte del equipo de Operaciones (Learning Success) de ISDI, tendrás la oportunidad de colaborar en una variedad de tareas esenciales para ayudar con la coordinación de nuestras formaciones. Trabajarás estrechamente con profesionales de distintos sectores y podrás ayudar a que nuestros alumnos y alumnas tengan una gran experiencia durante su formación en ISDI.




Estas serán tus funciones principales:




- Soporte técnico y humano en las sesiones presenciales y online.

- Recibir al docente, cargar la presentación y dar indicaciones a los alumnos si fuera necesario.

- Dar seguimiento al desarrollo de las clases en impartición, actuando de manera proactiva si se detectan problemas o incidencias.

- Controlar el horario de las clases.

- Calendarizar en Salesforce y Google Calendar las sesiones de los diferentes programas.

- Enviar las hojas de pedido a los expertos.

- Mandar las encuestas al finalizar las clases.

- Apoyar en la gestión del campus virtual

- Generar contenido desde dentro del aula y dar apoyo en los distintos eventos de ISDI (sesiones informativas, sesiones para la comunidad, Talent Days, etc)




¿Qué buscamos?




 * Estudiante actual de grado universitario, máster o formación profesional
 * Posibilidad de firmar un convenio de prácticas con una entidad educativa
 * Persona resolutiva y con capacidad de organización
 * Facilidad para manejar equipos tecnológicos




¿Qué ofrecemos?




 * Prácticas remuneradas, 25h/ semana.
 * Horario flexible: miércoles, jueves y viernes por las tardes; sábado por las mañanas en turnos rotativos.
 * Entorno de trabajo colaborativo en Carrer Diputació 37 (Barcelona)
 * Formación continua




En ISDI trabajamos de manera flexible, intentando conciliar nuestra vida personal y laboral.

Nuestro equipo destaca por su calidez humana: nos ayudamos y respetamos, además de promover un buen ambiente de trabajo. Uno de nuestros valores principales es la diversidad en todas sus formas.

title: Auxiliar de Óptica - Lucena
description:
¡ÚNETE AL EQUIPO AFFLELOU!

En ALAIN AFFLELOU, nuestra misión es crear un mundo sin barreras donde sentir y sentirse bien. Con esta promesa, llevamos más de 50 años revolucionando el mundo de la óptica y optometría.

Creemos firmemente en dos ideas: que llevar gafas o audífonos no debe ser un problema y que todos merecen disfrutar de su día a día con libertad.

¿Te gustaría ayudarnos a construirlo trabajando de Auxiliar de Óptica - Lucena?

¿Cómo será tu día a día?

Será responsable de proporcionar una experiencia excepcional a los clientes, ofreciendo asesoramiento personalizado.

¿Qué buscamos?


 * Será necesario que esté cursando el Grado de Optica-Optometría
 * Experiencia mínima: al menos 1 año
 * Excelentes dotes de comunicación, trabajo en equipo, confianza en el uso de equipo técnico, destreza manual y precisión, buena organización y planificación, atención al detalle.
   
   

¿Qué podemos ofrecerte como profesional del sector?

Te ofrecemos un contrato estable, Indefinido. Contarás con salario fijo, incentivos y beneficios sociales (pago colegiación profesional, seguro médico, descuentos de empleado, gafa anual, y mucho más!).

Además, te apoyaremos en tu crecimiento y desarrollo profesional para convertirte en el profesional que siempre has soñado ser: Contamos con formación continuada presencial y online: contarás con acceso a una plataforma de formación online, AFFLELOU ACADEMY, donde encontrarás innumerables cursos técnicos, y webinars mensuales, que te ayudarán a mantenerte actualizado.

Somos una compañía que trabaja día a día para impactar positivamente en la sociedad y generar un mundo más responsable. La diversidad, la inclusión y la igualdad de oportunidades son nuestro motivo para conseguirlo y, junto a ti, ¡lo lograremos!

Forma parte de nuestro equipo y crea con nosotros un mundo sin barreras donde sentir y sentirse bien
